app.name: ScalarDB
app.one_liner: A universal HTAP engine that enables ACID transactions and real-time analytics across heterogeneous databases.

screens.name: ScalarDB Overview
screens.purpose: Display core capabilities and integration options for ScalarDB as a universal HTAP engine.
primary_actions: Add dependency via Gradle or Maven

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist an item using ScalarDB's transaction API with ACID guarantees across heterogeneous backends.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate ScalarDB Core via Maven/Gradle
acceptance_tests: Confirm schema evolution features (column rename, drop, type change) work as documented in v3.17.0+.
Verify ACID compliance when executing cross-table transactions on Oracle with NUMBER(1) mapped to BOOLEAN.
